title: vulpia geniculata subsp. breviglumis
intro: Vulpia geniculata subsp. breviglumis, also known as slender hair grass or slender brome, is a type of grass species within the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Vulpia geniculata subsp. breviglumis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
